title: Local Cargo Transport
titleLarge: Fast and reliable local cargo transport within cities for quick deliveries
desc: Same-day delivery options with real-time GPS tracking. Multiple vehicle types including bikes, tempos, and trucks. Verified and trained drivers ensure safe delivery.
shortDesc: Fast, reliable, and affordable same-day delivery within your city with real-time tracking.
desc1: Our local cargo transport service is designed for businesses and individuals needing quick delivery of goods within the same city or district. We operate a fleet of well-maintained vehicles ranging from motorcycles for small parcels to trucks for larger shipments.
desc2: Every delivery is tracked in real-time using GPS technology. You can monitor your shipment's location, estimated arrival time, and communicate directly with your assigned rider through our mobile app.
desc3: Affordable pricing starting from just ₹100 with transparent distance-based pricing. No surge pricing, no hidden charges - what you see in the app is what you pay.

process.title: How It Works
processItems: Download the GS Trans app and register

title: Inter-City Freight
titleLarge: Seamless transport solutions connecting major cities and states
desc: Next-day delivery between major cities with door-to-door pickup and delivery service. Secure packaging, handling, and insurance coverage available.
shortDesc: Reliable inter-city freight service with next-day delivery and complete shipment tracking.
desc1: Connect major cities across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh with our inter-city freight service. Our scheduled routes ensure timely delivery while maintaining competitive pricing for bulk shipments.
desc2: We handle the entire logistics chain - from secure pickup at your location to final delivery at destination. All packages are professionally packaged, handled with care, and fully insured.
desc3: Live shipment tracking throughout the journey. Receive notifications at each checkpoint and get real-time updates on your delivery status.

title: Express Delivery
titleLarge: Ultra-fast delivery for urgent cargo with priority handling
desc: 2-4 hour delivery within city limits with dedicated rider assignment. Priority customer support and special handling for fragile items.
shortDesc: Urgent delivery when you need it most - ultra-fast 2-4 hour express service.
desc1: When every minute counts, our Express Delivery service ensures your cargo reaches its destination quickly. Dedicated rider assignment means your shipment gets full attention from pickup to delivery.
desc2: Premium handling for fragile and valuable items. Climate-controlled vehicles available for temperature-sensitive cargo. Real-time SMS and app updates keep you informed every step of the way.
desc3: Priority support team available to assist with any urgent requirements or changes to your delivery. Special packaging options for delicate items.

title: Business Solutions
titleLarge: Customized logistics solutions for businesses with recurring transport needs
desc: Monthly subscription plans with dedicated account manager. API integration for automated bookings and priority vehicle allocation.
shortDesc: Enterprise logistics solutions designed for growing businesses with recurring transport needs.
desc1: Perfect for businesses with daily or recurring transport requirements. Our Business Solutions package offers significant volume discounts and customized service levels tailored to your specific needs.
desc2: Dedicated account manager to handle all your logistics coordination. Monthly billing and comprehensive reporting dashboard. API integration allows seamless booking automation for your business systems.
desc3: Priority vehicle allocation ensures your shipments are handled first. Custom service agreements with flexible terms. Scalable solutions that grow with your business.

title: Specialized Item Transport
titleLarge: Premium transport for fragile, high-value, and specialized goods
desc: Specialized handling for fragile items, artwork, electronics, and furniture. White-glove delivery with insurance coverage and climate-controlled vehicles.
shortDesc: Premium transport for fragile and high-value items with specialized handling and insurance.
desc1: We understand that some items require extra care and attention. Our Specialized Item Transport service is designed for delicate goods including artwork, antiques, electronics, furniture, and other high-value items.
desc2: Professional packing with premium materials, dedicated rider assignment, and white-glove delivery service. All items are fully insured during transit. Climate-controlled vehicles available for temperature-sensitive items.
desc3: Real-time GPS tracking with photo documentation at each delivery point. Our trained specialists ensure your valuable items arrive in perfect condition. Flexible scheduling to minimize risk during transport.

title: Last-Mile E-Commerce Delivery
titleLarge: Dedicated last-mile delivery solutions for online retailers and marketplaces
desc: Bulk pickup from warehouses with optimized route planning and fast last-mile delivery. Integration with e-commerce platforms for automated order processing.
shortDesc: Efficient last-mile delivery for e-commerce businesses with warehouse integration and API support.
desc1: Perfect for online retailers and marketplace sellers. We handle bulk pickups from your warehouse and deliver directly to end customers with optimized routes for maximum efficiency.
desc2: Direct integration with popular e-commerce platforms via API. Automated order processing, label generation, and tracking updates. Competitive per-delivery pricing with volume discounts for high-volume sellers.
desc3: Live dashboard showing delivery status for all orders. Customer SMS and app notifications for delivery updates. Return merchandise authorization (RMA) support for hassle-free returns processing.
